chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 67 of2021 Date of hearin Order with si ature of ud Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/ob.jection 2.For hearing of main case Mr. Imdad Ali Malik, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G-Sindh. *i<+,t * Learned counsel for the petitioner files through statement a certificate issued by the Senior Superintendent, Central prison and Correctional Facility, Sukkur dated'19.72.2022, which shows that the petitioner has vacated the premises allotted to him. With the consent of learned AAG, this petition stands disposed of by directing the respondents to pay the service/pensionery benefits to the petitioner within a period of 30-days hereof.
